description: Typical Chart of Accounts for 15 Nigerian industries. Nigerian account code convention: 1000s=Assets, 2000s=Liabilities, 3000s=Equity, 4000s=Revenue, 5000s=Expenses. Each account includes IFRS reference for disclosure/treatment guidance.
author: Quadri Atharu

Oil & Gas.description: Upstream and integrated oil & gas operations in Nigeria (JOA, PSC, ML regimes)

Manufacturing.description: General and light manufacturing operations in Nigeria

Banking.description: Commercial and merchant banking operations in Nigeria (CBN regulated)

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Branch Leases

Insurance.description: Life and general insurance operations in Nigeria (NAICOM regulated)

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Office Leases

Retail.description: Retail and wholesale trade operations in Nigeria

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Shop Leases
Right of Use Assets - Tower Leases
Right of Use Assets - Fibre Leases

Agriculture.description: Agricultural operations including crop farming, livestock and fisheries in Nigeria

accounts.name: Change in Fair Value of Biological Assets

Construction.description: Construction and civil engineering operations in Nigeria (contract-based)

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Equipment Leases
Capital Work in Progress - Own Assets

Logistics.description: Logistics, haulage, warehousing and supply chain operations in Nigeria

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Vehicle Leases
Right of Use Assets - Warehouse Leases

Healthcare.description: Hospital, clinic and healthcare service operations in Nigeria

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Equipment Leases
Right of Use Assets - Building Leases

Education.description: Educational institution operations in Nigeria (primary, secondary, tertiary)

Government.description: Federal, state and local government financial operations in Nigeria (IPSAS aligned)

NGO.description: Non-governmental organisation operations in Nigeria (donor-funded, not-for-profit)

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Office Leases

Technology.description: Technology, software development and IT services operations in Nigeria

accounts.name: Right of Use Assets - Office Leases

Automotive.description: Automotive assembly, dealership and parts operations in Nigeria (NADDC regulated)
